subcodes.title: Words to Mr Pinchot and others, spoken on 1912-06-04
subcodes.first_line: We hope that in this gathering we shall partake of the heavenly table… The solution of this problem is one of the fundamental principles of his holiness BAHA’O’LLAH
subcodes.first_line_orig: امیدواریم در مجلس شما مائده آسمانی بخوریم آن بالتمامه مطابق مذاق ماست زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving, @war and peace, @elections, @stories; anecdotes, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @consultation
